riskAdjusted.label: Balanced
riskAdjusted.description: House default policy. When matched replay coverage is deep enough, the app can re-rank this profile against the other saved policies; until then it stays on fixed settings.
riskAdjusted.optimization_objective: Static balanced default while matched replay coverage remains limited

aggressive.label: Aggressive
aggressive.description: Looser thresholds and larger Kelly scaling for a higher-variance house policy.
aggressive.optimization_objective: Static aggressive default while matched replay coverage remains limited

capitalPreservation.label: Capital Preservation
capitalPreservation.description: Smaller capped stakes, no underdogs, and a focus on downside control.
capitalPreservation.optimization_objective: Static conservative default while matched replay coverage remains limited

strategy_optimization.method: Static defaults active until matched replay coverage reaches at least 20 settled games across 10 replay days (current sample: 33 games across 4 days).

summary.note: Replay results use only games with stored pregame forecast and odds snapshots.
